hero.headline: 22 Years of Worry-Free Pool Care
hero.subheadline: Sarasota's most trusted pool company serves 1,100+ families every week. Let our 25+ certified pros handle the chemistry, cleaning, and repairs so you can skip the work and just dive in.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care From<br class="hidden md:block"> a Team You Can Trust
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to full renovations, On-Time Pool Service has the expertise, equipment, and certified pros to handle every aspect of your pool.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Service
cards.description: Routine chemical balancing, surface skimming, vacuuming, and equipment checks. Your pool stays sparkling and swim-ready every single week.

cards.title: Equipment Repair & Install
cards.description: Variable-speed pumps, filters, heaters, saltwater chlorinators, and automation systems. Fast diagnosis and most repairs completed same-visit.

cards.title: Green to Clean Recovery
cards.description: Algae-covered or neglected pool? Our full diagnostic and deep-clean process brings it back to crystal-clear in days. Emergency response available.

cards.title: Pool Automation
cards.description: Control your pump, heater, lights, and more from your smartphone. We design and install smart pool systems for effortless management.

cards.title: Pool Renovations
cards.description: Resurfacing, custom tile, paver decks, LED lighting, and structural repairs. Transform your aging pool into a backyard showpiece.

cards.title: Salt System Conversions
cards.description: Upgrade to silky-smooth saltwater with professional installation and ongoing maintenance. Gentler on skin, easier on your schedule.

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Inspection
steps.description: Call us or fill out the form. We'll send a licensed technician to evaluate your pool, test the water, and provide an honest quote within 24 hours.

steps.title: We Take It From Here
steps.description: Our award-winning team arrives on schedule every week. Cleaning, chemicals, equipment checks, and swift repairs are all handled so you never have to think about it.

steps.title: Enjoy a Perfect Pool
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready year-round. With 22 years of experience behind every visit, you can trust that the job is done right.

about.label: Why Sarasota Trusts On-Time
about.headline: 22 Years of Earning Your Trust, One Pool at a Time
about.description: Founded in 2004, On-Time Pool Service has grown from a one-man operation into Sarasota's leading pool care company with 25+ dedicated professionals. We've earned the Herald Tribune Readers' Choice Award three years running, the Florida Swimming Pool Association's Service Professional of the Year, and a BBB A+ rating. Our team doesn't just maintain pools — we build lasting relationships with every family we serve.

features.title: Licensed Pool Contractor
features.description: Fully licensed (CPC#1459543), insured, and BBB A+ rated. Every technician is trained to the highest industry standards.

features.title: Award-Winning Service
features.description: Herald Tribune Readers' Choice 1st Place three years running and FSPA Service Professional of the Year. Results you can trust.

features.title: Respect, Integrity, Quality
features.description: Our core values aren't just words on a wall. They guide every interaction, every service visit, and every recommendation we make.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. Zero Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every pool is different. Contact us for a custom quote tailored to your pool's size, condition, and needs. No hidden fees, ever.

guarantee.headline: Our "On-Time" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not completely satisfied with any service visit, call us and we'll send a technician back at no charge. We've built our reputation on reliability, quality, and doing things right. That's not a slogan — it's been our standard for 22 years and over 532 five-star reviews.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start weekly service?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are added to our route within 3-5 business days. For green pool emergencies, we offer priority same-day or next-day response. Call us at 941-224-0404 and we'll get you scheduled fast.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve around Sarasota?
faqs.answer: We serve Sarasota, Lakewood Ranch, Siesta Key, Bee Ridge, Palmer Ranch, Nokomis, University Park, Bird Key, Casey Key, Osprey, Bradenton, Venice, Longboat Key, Lido Key, and surrounding communities.

faqs.question: Are your technicians licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. On-Time Pool Service holds a pool contractor license (CPC#1459543), full liability insurance, and a BBB A+ rating. Our team includes FSPA award-winning service professionals.

faqs.question: Can you install pool automation systems?
faqs.answer: Yes. We specialize in smart pool technology — from variable-speed pumps and saltwater systems to full smartphone-controlled automation. We'll design a system that fits your pool and budget.

faqs.question: What if I need a repair between service visits?
faqs.answer: Just call or text us. As a weekly service client, you get priority scheduling for repairs. Our team carries common parts on every truck, so most repairs can be completed the same visit.

testimonials.name: Ross H.
testimonials.text: I love y'all! If you need a customer reference, give them my number! Andy is awesome and the whole team delivers every single week.

testimonials.name: Cheryl S.
testimonials.text: On-Time Pool is just what it says — always on time. Excellent work every visit. Pool looked gorgeous all season long. Can't recommend them enough.

testimonials.name: Peter & Gary R.
testimonials.text: Excellent service, reliable and efficient. We've had a successful relationship with On-Time for years. The consistency and professionalism are unmatched.
